name: White Bean Chili#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Cook and stir onion and garlic in margarine in a 4-quart Dutch oven until the onion is tender.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients, except chopped tomato and tortilla chips.
4. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
5. Cover and simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve with tomato and tortilla chips.
